history.content:
.<thought>
The agent is facing north. Directly ahead is lava at (6,D). To the left is a wall at column C. To the right is a floor cell at (7,E). No goal is visible; I need to explore eastward. I will turn right to face east, then I can move forward to (7,E).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row7 col D facing north. The cell in front (row6 col D) is floor, while left is lava and right is wall. Moving forward is safe and allows exploration. The goal is not visible, so I should proceed north to discover more.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front is a floor cell (row 06, column D), and there are no immediate dangers. Moving forward will allow me to explore further and potentially find the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is not visible in the current observation. The agent is at row 7, column D, facing north. The cell directly ahead (row 6, column D) is floor ('.'), which is safe to move into. There is lava to the left and a wall to the right. The best immediate action is to move forward to explore more of the map.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 7, column D, facing north (up). The cell directly ahead (row 6, column D) is a safe floor cell. The adjacent cells to the left and right are lava or wall, so moving forward is the only safe option. I will move forward to explore further and look for the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front (north) is lava, so I cannot move forward. The only adjacent safe cell is to the west (row7, colC), which is floor. To move there, I need to first turn left to face west, then move forward. The goal is not visible yet, so exploration is necessary.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is at (1,F). The only safe route upward is through column D, which starts directly ahead. The cell in front (6,D) is safe, so I will move forward to begin ascending.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (7,D) facing north. The goal is at (2,F). The cell directly ahead (6,D) is safe floor. Moving forward will bring us closer to the path north along column D, then east at row3 to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (7, D) facing north (assumed). The cell directly ahead (6, D) is a floor cell, safe to move into. Moving forward will bring us closer to the goal, as we need to go north to row4 then east to colF. Therefore, I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is at (row04, col F) to the northeast. I am facing north at (row07, col D). The cell directly in front (row06, col D) is safe floor. I will move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is at (5, F). My current position is (7, D) facing north. The only safe adjacent cell is directly north at (6, D), which is empty. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal by allowing me to later navigate east and then north to reach (5, F). I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (07,D) facing up. The cell directly ahead (06,D) is safe but leads to a dead end (surrounded by lava and walls). The goal is at (06,F). A better path is to turn right to face right, then move to (07,E), then (07,F), then up to the goal. So the next action should be to turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 7, column D, facing north. The goal is at row 5, column C. The cell directly ahead (row 6, column D) is a floor cell, which is safe and leads toward the goal. I will move forward to approach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north (upwards). The goal is at row 06 column C, which is one step north and one step west of my current location. The cell directly in front (row 06 column D) is floor, so moving forward is safe and brings me closer to the goal. After moving, I will need to turn left to face west to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 7, column D, facing north. The goal is directly to the left (west) at row 7, column C. The cell directly ahead is a wall, so I cannot move forward. I will turn left to face the goal, then I can move forward into it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal cell is directly in front of me at row 06, column D. I can move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
